name: Bug report (English)
about: Something does not work as described
labels: bug
---

**Environment**

- Operating system and version (e.g. macOS 26.5, Windows 11 24H2):
- Hardware (CPU, RAM):
- VoiceWall version or commit (shown in the footer of the app):
- Installation route (setup script or developer route):

**What did you do?**

**What did you expect?**

**What happened instead?**

**Log excerpt** (macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/VoiceWall/logs/`,
Windows: `%APPDATA%\VoiceWall\logs\`; the logs contain no dictation
contents). For UI topics, please attach a screenshot.

Please do NOT report security-relevant findings as a public issue;
use the channel in SECURITY.en.md instead.
